{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = sword
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] produced a [[sword]] from his [[soulspace]] with a white [[wintersteel]] core and a crimson edge.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
